'''''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''''' in association with  '''''[https://www.instagram.com/villageresports/ Villager Esports]''''' present a Invitational BGMI tournament called the '''''LOCO War of Glory''''' with a huge prize pool of ₹55,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. The Grand Finals of the tournament features a prize-pool of ₹40,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{box|start|padding=1em}}
{{broadcasterCard
|position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in
|b1=CrackJacker Gaming

|b3=HornetFear
|b4=Smart Wolf
}}
{{box|end}}

===Format===
'''''LOCO War of Glory Grand Finals:''' 25th October 2021 to 31st October 2021.''
* ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]]''
* ''18 Teams qualified from [[LOCO_War_of_Glory/League_Stage|League Stage]]'' will play in the Grand Finals.
* ''35 Matches to be played over a period of 7 days.''
